scripts.load: docker compose --profile load run --rm k6 run
scripts.load:reset: docker compose --profile app --profile load down && rm -rf data && docker compose --profile app up -d --build
scripts.load:reset:attach: docker compose --profile app --profile load down && rm -rf data && docker compose --profile app up --build
scripts.load:herd: docker compose --profile load run --rm k6 run scenarios/thundering-herd.js
scripts.load:one-per-user: docker compose --profile load run --rm k6 run scenarios/one-per-user.js
scripts.load:window: docker compose --profile load run --rm k6 run scenarios/sale-window.js
scripts.load:fault-redis: docker compose --profile load run --rm k6 run scenarios/fault-redis.js
